textByHashes.ac272f724d5019fc96c662407487cb7d23319b48: Hello, I've been expecting you. Elena tells me you need to cross the wall.
textByHashes.1b5f341446176f76006a1ebb7704f1984128ad6b: My messenger pigeons help me communicate with friends over the wall.
textByHashes.f68f8b10399f263ca63f47f851a18933cc9bf9b7: I have arranged for two of them to aid you with a rope ladder. Omart is waiting for you at the southern end of the wall.
textByHashes.f4c12f5c1f5801a1992d9dc371bafcab7dcb609d: But be careful, if the mourners catch you, the punishment will be severe.
textByHashes.d1752350d55151b5b146bc7b0a8dbf526c921b00: Hello again. Have you spoken to Omart yet?
textByHashes.6bbb348eefdb733682a1106bd17c0099b5f35551: You'll find him at the southern end of the wall. Keep an eye out for them mourners.
textByHashes.4f61706abd20dce79c3ad8ba8829b2a47571b4ff: Pigeons? What do you need my pigeons for?
textByHashes.f7dd94790971cff880d786c05ef1de2850f6a7a1: Ahh, very clever. Well I'm sure I can let you borrow some, as long as you look after them. Just grab one of the cages from behind my house. You'll want some bird feed as well. I should have some in my cupboard.
textByHashes.78d039f82c9102c34dfeca8e1db0b5ebefad9e6f: The guards are distracted by the birds, you must go now, quickly traveller.
textByHashes.05e112525649113d37cf5ef01b79eb290c2573c5: So you've returned traveller. Did you get what you wanted?
textByHashes.6166ef1e4deef72a19f036e3eeab9baddc92f35d: Omart will be waiting by the wall, in case you need to cross again.
